reason: Vendored Public-Domain R Markdown filter that converts Pandoc Divs with a latex attribute into LaTeX environments. The dofile loads R Markdown's shared.lua via the RMARKDOWN_LUA_SHARED env var, which is unset in the PaperBell runtime — so it is inert here and no recipe references it. Kept for reference; see NOTICE.
Same vendored R Markdown latex-div filter (require 'text'). Inert in the PaperBell runtime; kept for reference. See NOTICE.
